title: 24 Eylül 2021 Tarihli DÜİYES Hakkında Önemli Bilgilendirme

24 September 2021 English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES)

Click here

for DÜİYES OUTLINE

Foreign Languages Unit English Preparatory Programme 2021-2022 Academic Year Fall Semester DÜİYES Procedures and Principles

Dear Students,

2021-2022 Fall Semester English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES) will be administered on

Friday, September 24, 2021

and will be invigilated face to face on Dudullu Campus. The exam consists of two sessions and the students are required to attend both sessions.

* The students are to be present in the class where they will take the exam at

09.30

so that the invigilators can check the students’ ID cards on time.

*  Students must have a valid ID with photo (student ID card, passport, driver's license) during the exam. You need to present a valid ID to be admitted to the exam.

* Information about the class lists will be announced on our website on

Wednesday, September 22.

* The students need to bring a blue pen, pencil and an eraser.

*  DÜİYES results will be announced on

October 1, 2021.
